title: Muchachas de Uniforme
writer: Edmundo Báez, Egon Eis, Christa Winsloe
actors: Marga López, Alicia Caro, Rosaura Revueltas
plot: Irasema Dilián stars as the orphan Manuela whose passionate crush on her teacher Lucila (Marga Lopez) scandalizes their all-girl Catholic school. An exceptional Mexican remake of the 1931 German original, Maedchen in Uniform.
